# Waiter Boys (2025)

> Award-winning short comedy film about underdog FBI agents going
> undercover — again — to investigate a mysterious orange syrup-like
> substance appearing around the city. 16 minutes. Watch free on YouTube.

## Synopsis

Reports of a strange orange syrup-like substance are appearing all around
the city. Emerging from the background of past events, these underdog FBI
agents are forced to go undercover — again.

## Facts

- **Title:** Waiter Boys
- **Year:** 2025
- **Released:** 2025-04-12
- **Runtime:** 16 minutes
- **Genre:** Comedy, Short Film
- **Language:** English (US)
- **Country:** United States (filmed in Chicago)
- **Director:** Skylar Kendall
- **Writers:** Skylar Kendall, Frank Rizzo
- **Producers:** Skylar Kendall, Frank Rizzo
- **Production Companies:** Rizzo Productions, SkyK Film Productions
- **Budget:** ~$500 (microbudget independent production)

## Where to watch

- [Watch on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zS43lgYXDrA) — free, official upload
- [Official site](https://waiterboys.com/)

## Awards (all 2025 wins)

- **Paris Film Awards 2025** — May Award, Best Comedy
- **London Movie Awards 2025** — May Award, Best Actress (Shelby Henderson)
- **Best Shorts Competition 2025** — Award of Recognition, Ensemble Cast
- **Florence Film Awards 2025** — Silver Award, Best Comedy

## Cast

- Frank Rizzo as Randy — [IMDb](https://www.imdb.com/name/nm16283183/)
- Ricky J. Zumot as Steve Dar — [IMDb](https://www.imdb.com/name/nm15315048/)
- Leonidas Wilkinson as Mickey — [IMDb](https://www.imdb.com/name/nm16650219/)
- Skylar Kendall as James — [IMDb](https://www.imdb.com/name/nm16339487/)
- Ben Tengowski as Rodger — [IMDb](https://www.imdb.com/name/nm16656104/)
- RJ Smith as Tom — [IMDb](https://www.imdb.com/name/nm16916013/)
- Lorenzo Parenza as Gabe — [IMDb](https://www.imdb.com/name/nm16079983/)
- Brandon Layne as Bobby — [IMDb](https://www.imdb.com/name/nm17194063/)
- Tré Walker as Vic — [IMDb](https://www.imdb.com/name/nm17142098/)
- Phan Le as Ali — [IMDb](https://www.imdb.com/name/nm17192596/)
- Arlecia Stapleton as Tina — [IMDb](https://www.imdb.com/name/nm17192598/)
- Shelby Henderson as Mandy — [IMDb](https://www.imdb.com/name/nm17192597/) (Best Actress winner, London Movie Awards 2025)

## Trivia

Almost the entire cast either met on the set of *Deli Boys* (2025 TV
series) or through Second City Chicago. The film was produced on a
budget of about $500.

## Links

- [IMDb](https://www.imdb.com/title/tt36255647/)
- [Letterboxd](https://letterboxd.com/film/waiter-boys/)
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/waiter.boys/)
- [YouTube (full film)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zS43lgYXDrA)
